title: OUROBOROS SMP
description: Vanilla+ Modpack made for the Ouroboros SMP
body:
This modpack is designed to be used for the Ouroboros Vanilla+ SMP.

> # SERVER INFO
1. we are on version **1.21.1** on **JAVA**
2. the server is running on **FABRIC**
3. this is a **MODDED VANILLA+ SERVER**

> ## **this is a semi anarchy server, meaning GRIEFING AND STEALING IS ALLOWED. but with that in mind:**
1. no hack clients. die with honor
2. you may only set up chunk claims for anti-griefing measures on bases, which must have __an active, in-use respawn point that you are linked to__. portions that are considered part of the base and are allowed to be included in chunk claims around your respawn point are the following:
  - storage systems
  - supersmelters
  - pet chambers
3. farms of all kinds (iron, food, animal, etc) and machine weaponry (orbital strike cannons, railcannons, tnt cannons, etc) __are free game for griefing.__ 
-# enderpearl cannons, while not offensive, also fall under the machine weaponry category
4. dedicated single item duping machines (carpet dupers, tnt dupers, etc), if they work, __are allowed.__ duping techniques (for universal item duping) are not.
5. you are allowed to form teams and alliances! infact this is probably encouraged for your survival

> ## **other information**
1. __THIS IS A MODDED SERVER,__ meaning you will need the serverside required mods to even log on! please view #mods in the discord server for further info
2. __THIS IS A LIFESTEAL SERVER,__ meaning once you die, you will permanently(ish) lose an entire heart of max health. you can gain this back by killing other players and taking their hearts.
3. __KEEP-INVENTORY IS SEMI.__ you will keep your tools and armor, but you will need to retrieve your other items, resources, and exp from the location of death. try not to get beheaded either, or else people can have a trophy of you!
4. __THE SERVER IS ON 1.21.1__, meaning no pale oak! sorry! a lot of mods only support 1.21.1 so we eventually settled on this.
5. __THIS IS A WHITELIST ONLY SERVER__. if you want to invite someone who wasn't in the initial invite wave, you'll have to vouch for them!
6. __THERE IS A VERY LIGHT/MILD PLOT__ for this server! while not mandatory, it will give motive to a lot of "rp/lore" character behavior. feel free to read about it in the discord server lore channel.
